## Excel File Workflows

## CRITICAL: Use Formulas, Not Hardcoded Values

**Always use Excel formulas instead of calculating values in Python and hardcoding them.** This ensures the spreadsheet remains dynamic and updateable.

### ❌ WRONG - Hardcoding Calculated Values
```python
# Bad: Calculating in Python and hardcoding result

sheet['B10'] = total  # Hardcodes 5000

Example:
```bash
python scripts/recalc.py output.xlsx 30
```

The script:
- Automatically sets up LibreOffice macro on first run
- Recalculates all formulas in all sheets
- Scans ALL cells for Excel errors (#REF!, #DIV/0!, etc.)
- Returns JSON with detailed error locations and counts
- Works on both Linux and macOS

## Formula Verification Checklist

Quick checks to ensure formulas work correctly:

### Essential Verification
- [ ] **Test 2-3 sample references**: Verify they pull correct values before building full model
- [ ] **Column mapping**: Confirm Excel columns match (e.g., column 64 = BL, not BK)
- [ ] **Row offset**: Remember Excel rows are 1-indexed (DataFrame row 5 = Excel row 6)

### Common Pitfalls
- [ ] **NaN handling**: Check for null values with `pd.notna()`
- [ ] **Far-right columns**: FY data often in columns 50+

response:
"<webfetch-citation source_id="JEW8Ij9tEEOVSw8XcJgAe" />

### Benefits

As an employee of Barrow County Schools, you are eligible to participate in a comprehensive array of employee benefits. Our benefits offer you a cost-effective means to protect your pay and personal savings and to achieve a secure retirement. You might consider your benefits as an additional "hidden paycheck" because they add so much value to your direct pay.

### We offer the following benefits

- Health Insurance
- Dental
- Vision
- Disability (Short-Term and Long-Term)
- Life Insurance (Board Paid and Supplemental)
- Critical Illness
- Accidental Death
- Retirement - TRS or PSERS and 403b and 457b options
- Employee Assistance
- FSA Health and Dependent
- Student Loan Debt Relief

**Current Employees:**

- If you are a current employee and you’re looking for information about your benefits, you can now find it on the Barrow County School System Intranet within the Human Resources site.

**Benefits Contact:**

- Please email [Aimee Tucker](mailto:aimee.tucker@barrow.k12.ga.us) with any benefit questions."

##### JCSS Has Been Named a 2024 & 2025 AJC Today Top Workplace!

###### Welcome to Jackson County Schools! We are seeking dedicated professionals looking to join our team who are committed to excelling nationally in academics, arts and athletics, while fostering the development of well-rounded individuals who contribute positively to society.

### Begin & Finish Your Career With Us

The Jackson County School System is the dedicated home to nearly 800 classroom teachers and over 1,500 employees who are passionate about student success. The Jackson County School System is committed to building a safe, engaging and supportive learning environment for each student inside each of its 13 school locations.

We also believe that individuals should be able to start and finish their careers within the Jackson County School System by providing a positive, warm workplace environment where individuals love to come to work each d...[truncated 2788 chars]...cating to the community.

Jackson County is home to multiple municipalities, including Arcade, Braselton, Commerce, Hoschton, Jefferson, Pendergrass and Talmo.

## Teach in the Peach

[Teach in the Peach](https://teachinthepeach.org/) is a statewide initiative to recruit and retain the best teachers in the state of Georgia. This site provides detailed steps on how to become a Georgia educator as well as the many benefits and supports the state provides.

## Compensation

It is the goal of the Jackson County School System to recruit, employ, develop and retain a highly qualified workforce throughout the system. The Jackson County School System and its Board of Education is committed to providing the appropriate compensation and a robust benefits package to its employees, while providing a high-quality education to its students.

[Click Here to Learn More About Compensation](/fs/pages/3497)

[Click Here to Learn More About Benefits](https://mymarkiii.com/jacksonschoolsga/)"

response:
"<webfetch-citation source_id="KwhatKVWfBOTTRmQaRNJ5" />

## Working in Walton

Centrally located between the thriving streets of Atlanta and the classic city of Athens, Walton County offers a relaxing, friendly community with large businesses, local shops and affordable housing. Walton County affords residents a simple lifestyle with easy access to all the amenities offered by city living. A few minutes drive brings you to parks like Stone Mountain and Ft. Yargo. Every kind of shopping you could desire is just a few minutes in any direction. The North GA Mountains are less than two hours away. Walton County itself has many beautiful country settings and small town charm. You can avoid many of the hassles of urban living, while still enjoying the benefits of having it nearby.  
  
The school district is comprised of 15 schools. There are nine elementary schools, three middle schools and three high schools. The school district also has one alternative center.

Being a part of the Walton County School District team provides many opportunities for professional growth. We are pleased that you are interested in our school district. Please contact us Human Resources with any questions regarding employment.
